{{Infobox group
| name = Sector Control
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sector]] Control is an administrative and supervisory entity within the [[Abidan]] organization. It functions as a governing body that monitors various sectors of existence, such as [[Sector Seven]] and [[Sector Twenty]]-one, and manages the oversight of different [[Iterations]]. The entity is responsible for addressing violations of cosmic law, such as individuals attempting to establish unauthorized territories in simple planes of existence. [[Sector]] Control can issue warnings, request immediate responses from [[Judges]] to address breaches, and approve or investigate the actions of various [[Abidan]] divisions. It maintains headquarters for specific regions, such as a command center for Sectors One through Twenty-one, where orders can be delivered via a [[Presence]]. While it provides structure and oversight, its authority is sometimes bypassed by unsanctioned missions or individuals operating outside of legal protocols.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel's ghost]] consults [[Sector Control]] for clearance.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sector Control]] is an entity [[Suriel's Presence]] suggests alerting.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sector Control]] headquarters for Sectors One through Twenty-one is where [[Makiel's Presence]] appeared.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sector Control]] requested a [[Judge]] response.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sector Control]] approved the plan to demolish reality.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]]'s mission is not officially sanctioned by [[Sector Control]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
